revision.text:
[[ja:平井地区1号墳]] {{Infobox ancient site}} {{Infobox burial site | name = Hirai District No. 1 Kofun | image = [[File:Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1, funkyu.jpg|280px]]
Kofun mound | other_name = Hirai District No. 1 Kofun | part_of = {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroishi Kofun Group|qq=}} | location = {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|en|Fujioka, Gunma|qid=Q596486|lt=Fujioka, Gunma|1=Fujioka, Gunma}}, Gunma Prefecture
(Part of {{ill|Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja|毛野国白石丘陵公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keno-no-Kuni Shiroishi Hills Park|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}) | coordinates = {{coord|36|15|35.15|N|139|02|30.35|E|region:JP-10|display=inline,title}} | shape = {{ill|Round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} | area = Diameter: 24 m (or 30 m)
Height: 3.5 m | burial = Dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-style stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} | artifacts = {{ill|Decorated sword|ja|装飾大刀|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Decorated sword|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 装飾付大刀|1=decorated swords|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q48749737}}, haniwa, {{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|qid=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery|1=Sue pottery}}, {{ill|Haji pottery|en|Haji pottery|qid=Q5639938|lt=Haji pottery|1=Haji pottery}}, and other grave goods | period = Late {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|qid=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}} (late 6th century) | status = Gunma Prefecture Designated Historic Site
Artifacts designated as Important Cultural Properties of Japan }} '''Hirai District No. 1 Kofun''' (平井地区1号墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} (tumulus) located in {{ill|Fujioka, Gunma|en|Fujioka, Gunma|qid=Q596486|lt=Fujioka, Gunma|1=Fujioka, Gunma}}, Gunma Prefecture. It is part of the {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroishi Kofun Group|qq=}} and has been designated as a Gunma Prefecture Historic Site. Artifacts from the site have been designated as Important Cultural Properties of Japan. == Overview == [[File:Ojizuka Kofun and Hirai Kofun Group (Fujioka)-1.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Left: Hirai District No. 1 Kofun, Right: {{ill|Ōjizuka Kofun (Fujioka)|ja|皇子塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōjizuka Kofun (Fujioka)|qq=}}}}]] Hirai District No. 1 Kofun was constructed on the northern end of a tongue-shaped river terrace on the left bank of the Ayukawa River in southern Gunma Prefecture.Historical site description board, installed by the Gunma Prefecture and Fujioka City Boards of Education. The nearby {{ill|Ōjizuka Kofun (Fujioka)|ja|皇子塚古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōjizuka Kofun (Fujioka)|qq=}} is located to the south. An archaeological survey was conducted in 1991 to confirm the tumulus's extent. The tumulus is circular, with a diameter of 24 meters (or 30 meters), a height of 3.5 meters, and two-tiered construction. Surrounding the mound is a foundation platform. Artifacts such as {{ill|Fukiishi|en|Fukiishi|qid=Q11621213|lt=fukiishi|1=Fukiishi}}, {{ill|cylindrical haniwa|ja|円筒埴輪|1=Cylindrical Haniwa|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cylindrical haniwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Cylindrical Haniwa|qq=}} (including morning-glory-shaped haniwa), and figurative haniwa (house-shaped, quiver-shaped, sword-shaped, shield-shaped, and hat-shaped) have been discovered. The burial chamber is a dual-chambered {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoana-style stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}} with a rare northern orientation. The chamber contained grave goods, including two decorated swords, one of which features a single-phoenix motif, attracting significant attention. The tumulus is estimated to have been constructed in the late 6th century, around the same time as Ōjizuka Kofun. == Burial Structure == The burial chamber is a dual-chambered yokoana-style stone chamber oriented to the north, which is unusual. Its dimensions are as follows:{{Harv|平井地区1号古墳（続古墳）|2002}} * Total length: 6.8 meters * Main chamber: Length 3.65 meters, rear width 2.1 meters, entrance width 1.25 meters * Passageway: Length 3.15 meters, width 0.85 meters The chamber was constructed using cut tuff blocks in an orderly arrangement.{{Harv|平井地区1号古墳（続古墳）|2002}} Ritual features, such as stone-paved areas, were identified at the entrance and on the tumulus summit.{{Harv|平井地区1号古墳（続古墳）|2002}} == Artifacts == Artifacts from the chamber include:{{Cite web|和書|title=群馬県平井一号墳出土品|url=https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf|publisher=群馬県教育委員会}} * Swords ** Single-phoenix ring-pommel sword with gold and silver inlay ** Silver-inlaid round-pommel sword ** Straight sword * 15 gold rings * 22 iron arrowheads * Horse tack * Iron ritual implements (plow, axe, chisel) * {{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|qid=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery|1=Sue pottery}} Artifacts recovered from other parts of the site include: * Figurative haniwa (house-shaped, quiver-shaped, sword-shaped, etc.) * Sue pottery and Haji pottery These artifacts have been designated as Important Cultural Properties of Japan. File:平井地区1号古墳出土 金銀装単鳳環頭.JPG|Gold and silver inlaid single-phoenix ring-pommel sword File:平井地区1号古墳出土 銀象嵌円頭.JPG|Silver-inlaid round-pommel sword == Cultural Heritage == === Important Cultural Properties of Japan === * Artifacts from Hirai District No. 1 Kofun (designated on June 30, 1997) === Gunma Prefecture Designated Cultural Properties === * Hirai District No. 1 Kofun (designated on April 20, 1993) == Related Facilities == * Fujioka History Museum (Fujioka City, Shiroishi) - Displays artifacts from Hirai District No. 1 Kofun. == References == {{Reflist}} == Further Reading == * {{Cite book|和書|editor=|author=志村哲|year=2002|chapter=平井地区1号古墳|title=[[日本古墳大辞典|続 日本古墳大辞典]]|publisher=[[東京堂出版]]|isbn=4490105991}} == See Also == * {{ill|Shiroishi Kofun Group|ja|白石古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroishi Kofun Group|qq=}} == External Links == * {{Cite web|和書|title=群馬県平井一号墳出土品|url=https://www.pref.gunma.jp/contents/100155734.pdf|publisher=群馬県教育委員会}} * [https://www.city.fujioka.gunma.jp/kakuka/f_bunkazai/hirai1goukohun.html Hirai District No. 1 Kofun - Fujioka City website] {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|平井地区1号墳|version=99995209|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:平井地区1号墳]] {{wikidata link|Q109365272}} [[Category:Designated historic sites of Gunma Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Fujioka, Gunma]] [[Category:Important Cultural Properties of Japan]] [[Category:Important Cultural Property of Japan in Gunma prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun of Gunma prefecture]] [[Category:Round Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
